  (= 
    (g $x) $x)
  (= 
    (g $x) 
    (* 2 $x))
  (= 
    (g test 
      ($y $z)) 
    (* 
      (* 1 $y) $z))
  (= 
    (g 3 
      ($y $z)) 
    (* $y $z))
  (= 
    (g $x 
      ($y $z)) 
    (* 
      (* $x $y) 42))
  (= 
    (g $x 
      ($y $z)) 
    (* 
      (* 42 $x) $y))
  (= 
    (g a 
      ($y w)) $y)
;; In file as:  
  !(g 42 
    (1 2))
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (g 42 
      (1 2)) 
    (1764 1764))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.MULTIFUNCTION.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.000688 secs. (688.24 microseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (g 42 
      (1 2)) 
    (1764 1764))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (1764 1764) 
      (1764 1764)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5950))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (g 42 
            (1 2)) 
          (1764 1764)) $_3886) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4222) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3886 $_4250) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4250)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5950))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (g 42 
            (1 2)) 
          (1764 1764)) $_3886) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4222) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3886 $_4250) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4250)))))
